Class MSFTStorage

java.lang.Object
oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.MSFTStorage
@ThreadSafe public class MSFTStorage extends Object
Constants and property enums for WMI classes in the Storage namespace associated with Storage Pools.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    MSFTStorage.PhysicalDiskProperty
    Properties for a physical disk.
    static enum 
    MSFTStorage.StoragePoolProperty
    Properties to identify the storage pool.
    static enum 
    MSFTStorage.StoragePoolToPhysicalDiskProperty
    Properties to link a storage pool with a physical disk.
    static enum 
    MSFTStorage.VirtualDiskProperty
    Properties for a virtual disk.

  • Method Details

    • queryStoragePools

      public static WmiResult<MSFTStorage.StoragePoolProperty> queryStoragePools(WmiQueryExecutor h)
      Queries storage pools.
      Parameters:
      h - An instantiated WmiQueryExecutor. User should have already initialized COM.
      Returns:
      Storage pool information.

    • queryStoragePoolPhysicalDisks

      public static WmiResult<MSFTStorage.StoragePoolToPhysicalDiskProperty> queryStoragePoolPhysicalDisks(WmiQueryExecutor h)
      Queries storage pool to physical disk mapping.
      Parameters:
      h - An instantiated WmiQueryExecutor. User should have already initialized COM.
      Returns:
      Storage pool to physical disk mapping.

    • queryPhysicalDisks

      public static WmiResult<MSFTStorage.PhysicalDiskProperty> queryPhysicalDisks(WmiQueryExecutor h)
      Queries physical disks.
      Parameters:
      h - An instantiated WmiQueryExecutor. User should have already initialized COM.
      Returns:
      Physical disk information.

    • queryVirtualDisks

      public static WmiResult<MSFTStorage.VirtualDiskProperty> queryVirtualDisks(WmiQueryExecutor h)
      Queries virtual disks.
      Parameters:
      h - An instantiated WmiQueryExecutor. User should have already initialized COM.
      Returns:
      Virtual disk information.
